description: Create a sales commission plan for sales representative 'Joe Block' with the name 'Q3 2024 Sales Incentive' and search key 'COMM-Q3-2024'. The plan must use USD currency, an Invoice calculation basis, Quarterly frequency, and have List Details enabled. Include two commission lines: one for 'Base Sales Commission' with a multiplier of 5 (Positive Only) and another for 'Patio Furniture Bonus' with a multiplier of 10 (Positive Only) for the 'Patio Furniture' product category.
